parameters.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::INT AS duplicate_count
FROM invoice_log
WHERE zalo_user_id = '{{$("Validate Inputs").item.json.zalo_user_id}}'
  AND zalo_msg_id = '{{$("Validate Inputs").item.json.zalo_msg_id}}'
  AND status <> 'failed';

INSERT INTO invoice_log (
  zalo_user_id,
  zalo_msg_id,
  supplier_code,
  source_type,
  source_url,
  parsed_data,
  status,
  llm_confidence,
  processing_time_ms,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{$json.zalo_user_id}}',
  '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}',
  '{{$json.supplier_code_sql}}',
  'xml',
  '{{$json.source_url_sql}}',
  '{{$json.parsed_data_sql}}'::jsonb,
  'processing',
  100.00,
  {{$json.processing_time_ms}},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id, zalo_msg_id) WHERE zalo_msg_id IS NOT NULL
DO NOTHING;
